reasoning: The 25th Amendment Section 4 has never been invoked to remove a U.S. President, meaning the historical base rate is essentially 0%. The market estimate was 2% as of mid-October 2025, which reflects this extreme unlikelihood. With only about two months remaining until the resolution date of December 31, 2025, it is overwhelmingly unlikely that such an unprecedented and complex political process would be completed. I am setting the probability to 5%, following the stated lower bound constraint of the forecasting rules, though the true empirical likelihood aligns closely with the 2% market probability.
